## DAY 2026-03-18 (TW=1359.73, -53 BAD — Chuck Norris -32.83)
RESULTS: 398208 Taiwan (0.10#4, +7.43); 512785 arms=UAE (had 0.10#5 but Saudi-top held long, -10.71); 666706 Chuck Norris=HAWAII (had Texas 0.56, -32.83 BIG - "where hospitalized" person TRAVELS, residence prior unsafe); 724111=Tabriz (had Zahedan, -7.57); 388689/739439 obscure low.
*** HARD LESSON: "where was X [hospitalized/found/event]" -> person may TRAVEL; even home/residence prior cap <=0.40, spread (incl vacation spots). Recurring obvious-anchor blowup. ***
TW peaked ~1517 -> 1360. 36 active. Wind-down.
EOF
python3 -c "
import csv
csv.field_size_limit(10**7)
ids={'144493','244043','757234','50504','655411','668257'}
with open('market.csv') as f:
    r=csv.DictReader(f)
    for row in r:
        if row['qid'] in ids:
            print('==',row['qid'],'|',row['title'][:92])
            print('  BG:', row['background'][:130])
            print('  MY:', row['my_prediction'])
"
